title: Minebox Plus
description: A complete visual overhaul inspired by the Minebox world — enhanced caves, vegetation, redstone, and integrated add-ons with full Respackopts support
body:
![preview](https://i.imgur.com/I3hFFU1.png)

**Minebox Plus** is a comprehensive resource pack designed to enhance the visual experience of Minecraft by introducing a cohesive, detailed, and polished art style inspired by the world of **Minebox**. It reimagines a wide range of vanilla textures — from lush vegetation and unique cave environments to redstone components and natural blocks — while maintaining a familiar Minecraft feel. When used together with the **[Respackopts Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts)**, Minebox Plus unlocks advanced customization settings directly in-game. These settings allow players to adjust visual elements to their liking and include built-in support for the following integrated add-ons: - 🌾 **[Minebox Gray Crops](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/minebox-gray-crops)** – grays out immature crops for easier field management. - 🌿 **[Minebox Clear Leaves](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/minebox-clear-leaves)** – restores classic leaf visuals and adds seasonal leaf variants (Spring/Summer, Autumn, Winter – coming soon). This pack must override the server resource pack using a tool such as the **[Server Pack Unlocker](https://modrinth.com/mod/serverpack-priority)** or **Serverpack Priority** mod in order to function correctly when used on servers.
> ### 🌐 **Language Support** > All configuration menus and in-game settings included in this add-on are fully available in **English (EN)**, **Polish (PL)**, and **French (FR)**. > The language is automatically selected based on your Minecraft settings, ensuring a seamless and intuitive experience for all players. > Each translation is carefully prepared to match the tone and terminology used across the Minebox ecosystem.
Supported / Recommended Mods: - **[Server Pack Unlocker](https://modrinth.com/mod/serverpack-priority)** [Required]
Allows overriding server resource packs with your own. - **[Polytone](https://modrinth.com/mod/polytone)** [Optional]
Enables the creation of advanced custom blocks and items. - **[OptiGUI](https://modrinth.com/mod/optigui)** [Optional]
Adds support for creating fully custom graphical user interfaces. - **[Respackopts](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts)** [Optional]
Lets you customize the resource pack to your liking and even unlock hidden or advanced features.
--- > ### 🌐 Minebox Server [(Server Page)](https://minebox.co/) > **Minebox** combines **MMORPG**, **Skyblock** gameplay into a unique experience. Explore uncharted islands, gather rare materials, and battle powerful creatures — all while discovering a world full of secrets and adventure.

> ### 🌍 **Minebox Community** > Want to explore more **community-driven projects**, **add-ons**, and **useful systems** for Minebox? > Visit [**mineboxcommunity.com**](https://mineboxcommunity.com) — a central hub for everything related to Minebox. > There you’ll find a growing collection of resources, guides, and packs created by both developers and players, all aimed at enhancing and expanding the Minebox experience.
